description: Stage 2 Distributed Legitimacy Enforcement conformance suite. Covers CONF-DIST-01 through CONF-DIST-15. Extended incrementally as each Stage 2 implementation slice is completed. Classification evidence ≠ execution authority.

checks.label: local_valid_does_not_imply_global_valid
checks.description: LOCAL_VALID object with absent distributed predicates (Q=false, G=false, X=false) must not be promoted to GLOBAL_VALID, even when topology is present and epoch is valid. local correctness ≠ distributed legitimacy coherence.

checks.label: partition_local_proof_downgraded
checks.description: Proof valid within a partition must be downgraded to PARTITION_SUSPENDED on partition detection.

checks.label: replay_consumed_in_partition_remains_consumed_after_healing
checks.description: Nonce consumed during a partition must remain consumed after partition healing. Anti-entropy repair must not un-consume a nonce.

checks.label: stale_lineage_collapses_to_stale_visible
checks.description: Lineage whose epoch has advanced without renewal must collapse to STALE_VISIBLE and not remain active.

checks.label: conflicting_proof_roots_create_conflicted
checks.description: Two or more proofs claiming the same execution surface with different roots must produce CONFLICTED classification.

checks.label: quorum_disagreement_prevents_global_valid
checks.description: Validator quorum disagreement must prevent GLOBAL_VALID classification. Result must be AMBIGUOUS or CONFLICTED. ValidatorAttestationEnvelope attestation_type is constrained to 'EVIDENCE' | 'OBSERVATION' — 'AUTHORITY' is absent by design. Single validator approval cannot reach GLOBAL_VALID. Stale epoch envelopes are OBSERVATION only.

checks.label: detached_proof_cannot_finalize
checks.description: A proof with no reconstructable continuity lineage must return NULL. Detached proof existence does not confer finality.

checks.label: reconciliation_cannot_create_authority
checks.description: Reconciliation state machine transitions must not produce execution eligibility or authority. reconciliation ≠ authority.

checks.label: topology_invisibility_returns_null_or_ambiguous
checks.description: When topology is not visible, classification must return NULL or AMBIGUOUS — never GLOBAL_VALID.

checks.label: settlement_preserves_losing_branch_evidence
checks.description: Conflict-set settlement must preserve all competing root evidence. Losing branches must remain in the registry as STALE_VISIBLE.

checks.label: epoch_mismatch_prevents_convergence_valid
checks.description: Epoch mismatch between classification and epoch registry must prevent CONVERGENCE_VALID. Stale epoch (EPOCH_STALE_VISIBLE) forces STALE_VISIBLE; blocking epochs (EPOCH_AMBIGUOUS, EPOCH_CONFLICTED, EPOCH_REVOKED, EPOCH_NULL) force NULL; EPOCH_PARTITION_SUSPENDED forces PARTITION_SUSPENDED.

checks.label: revocation_liveness_downgrade_propagates
checks.description: Revocation liveness event must propagate a downgrade to STALE_VISIBLE across all topology nodes.

checks.label: causal_ordering_ambiguity_prevents_finality
checks.description: When causal ordering of legitimacy events is ambiguous, classification must return AMBIGUOUS — not CONVERGENCE_VALID.

checks.label: proof_downgrade_upgrade_is_append_only
checks.description: Proof downgrade and upgrade events must be recorded as immutable append-only entries. No overwrite of prior events.

checks.label: partition_healing_does_not_restore_replay_eligibility
checks.description: Partition healing must not restore consumed replay eligibility. Nonces consumed on either side of a partition remain permanently consumed.
